name: Tehran — Initial Strikes
headline: US-Israeli strikes across 24 provinces
detail: War begins with coordinated strikes across Iran. Tehran among primary targets.

name: Tehran — Golestan Palace (UNESCO)
headline: Golestan Palace damaged in strikes
detail: UNESCO World Heritage site Golestan Palace struck. Cultural heritage destruction documented.

name: Tehran — Elementary School #4
headline: Tehran elementary school struck
detail: Fourth school hit during conflict. Part of escalating civilian infrastructure damage.

name: Mehrabad Airbase — Overnight Strike
headline: Mehrabad airbase struck overnight
detail: Major military airbase in Tehran struck during Phase 2 operations.

name: Evin Prison
headline: Evin Prison — US detainees and NHK journalist held
detail: Prison holding US detainees and NHK bureau chief. Status unconfirmed amid strikes.

name: Azadi Stadium Destroyed
headline: Azadi Stadium destroyed
detail: Iran's largest stadium destroyed in strikes.

name: Isfahan — Strikes
headline: Isfahan military-industrial targets struck
detail: Isfahan targeted as major military-industrial center. Multiple facilities hit.

name: Shiraz — 20 Dead
headline: Shiraz strikes kill 20
detail: Strikes on Shiraz result in 20 reported deaths.

name: Bushehr — Nuclear/Military
headline: Bushehr area targeted
detail: Strikes near Bushehr nuclear and military facilities.

name: Bandar Abbas — Naval Base
headline: Bandar Abbas naval facilities struck
detail: IRGC Navy headquarters at Bandar Abbas targeted. Major port facility.

name: Parchin — Nuclear Facility
headline: Parchin struck twice
detail: Parchin military-nuclear complex struck. Nuclear-specific damage NOT confirmed.

name: Natanz — IAEA Confirms Damage
headline: Natanz nuclear facility struck
detail: IAEA confirms damage to Natanz enrichment facility. Centrifuge halls affected.

name: Qom — IDF Displacement Order
headline: IDF issues displacement order for Qom
detail: First IDF displacement order inside Iran. Signals expansion of targeting to religious center.

name: Minab — School Strike (175 Children)
headline: Minab school struck — children killed
detail: IRGC proximity to school investigated. US Army acknowledges. 175 children affected. Deadliest single civilian incident.

name: Parand — Schools Struck (x2)
headline: Two schools struck in Parand
detail: Two schools hit in Parand suburb. Part of escalating civilian casualties.

name: Ahvaz — Strikes
headline: Ahvaz military targets struck
detail: Strikes on IRGC facilities in Ahvaz, Khuzestan province.

name: Kerman — Strikes
headline: Kerman targeted in initial wave
detail: Kerman province struck as part of 24-province opening campaign.

name: Tabriz — Strikes
headline: Tabriz military facilities struck
detail: Northwestern Iran strikes targeting IRGC facilities near Tabriz.

name: Mashhad — Strikes
headline: Mashhad targeted
detail: Strikes reaching northeastern Iran. Mashhad is Iran's second-largest city.

name: Dubai/UAE — 1,268 Projectiles
headline: UAE struck by 1,268 projectiles
detail: Cumulative: 196 missiles + 1,072 drones. 3+ dead, 94+ wounded. ~4,000 flight cancellations.

name: Dubai — AWS Data Centers Hit
headline: AWS data centers struck in Dubai
detail: Cloud infrastructure damaged by Iranian strikes. Major disruption to regional services.

name: Kuwait — Airport Damaged
headline: Kuwait Airport physically damaged by drones
detail: Airspace fully closed. US embassy suspended operations. Kuwait Airways rerouted via Jeddah. 3 dead, 32+ wounded.

name: Shuaiba — 6 US KIA
headline: 6 US service members killed at Shuaiba
detail: First US casualties of conflict. IRGC missile/drone attack on Shuaiba base, Kuwait.

name: Bahrain — 221 Intercepted
headline: Bahrain intercepts 78 missiles + 143 drones
detail: 221 total projectiles intercepted. 1 dead, 6 wounded. Sitra clashes reported.

name: BAPCO Refinery — Fire
headline: BAPCO refinery hit — fire contained
detail: Bahrain Petroleum Company refinery struck by IRGC attack. Fire contained but operations disrupted.

name: Qatar — LNG Halted
headline: QatarEnergy halts LNG exports
detail: LNG exports suspended. Qatar warns $150/bbl in 2-3 weeks if Hormuz stays closed. Airspace partially reopened Mar 6.

name: Strait of Hormuz — Selective Closure
headline: IRGC declares Hormuz closed
detail: Selective closure — Chinese ships passing. 10+ tankers burning. 2 transits/day reported. Force majeure imminent.

name: Hormuz — Tankers Burning
headline: 10+ tankers burning in Strait of Hormuz
detail: Multiple commercial vessels on fire. P&I insurance cancelled for Gulf transit.

name: IRIS Dena Sunk
headline: US submarine sinks IRIS Dena — first torpedo kill since WWII
detail: Iranian warship IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine torpedo. First such engagement since World War II.

name: IRIS Shahid Bagheri Burning
headline: IRIS Shahid Bagheri burning — sinking unconfirmed
detail: Second major Iranian warship engaged. Sinking not yet confirmed.

name: Oil Tanker Struck Off Kuwait
headline: Iran strikes 'US-owned' oil tanker off Kuwait
detail: Commercial shipping warfare escalation. Tanker on fire. Name, flag, damage unconfirmed.

name: 25 Iranian Warships Struck
headline: Trump/CNN: 25 warships struck, 'destroyed their navy'
detail: Trump claims 25 Iranian warships struck. 30+ ships sunk total per previous reports.

name: Kuwait — US Embassy Suspended
headline: US Embassy Kuwait suspends operations
detail: Embassy operations suspended due to ongoing attacks. 100K-200K Americans stranded in region.

name: Ras Tanura — Saudi Refinery
headline: Ras Tanura refinery shut down
detail: Saudi Arabia's largest refinery shut after drone/missile attack. Saudi intercepted 6 drones + 4 drones + 3 missiles across attacks.

name: Dammam — Saudi Strikes
headline: Dammam area targeted by IRGC
detail: Eastern Province oil infrastructure targeted.

name: Abu Dhabi — Strikes
headline: Abu Dhabi targeted
detail: UAE capital targeted by IRGC missiles and drones.

name: Fujairah — Port/Bunkering
headline: Fujairah port area affected
detail: Major bunkering port disrupted by Gulf conflict.

name: Dahiya (Beirut) — 26 Strikes
headline: 26 IDF strikes on Dahiya
detail: Hezbollah southern Beirut stronghold hit with 26 strikes. IRGC Air Force command + Hezbollah naval HQ destroyed. 217 dead, 798 wounded in Lebanon total.

name: Beirut — 700K Displaced
headline: 700,000 affected by Beirut evacuation order
detail: IDF evacuation order for Beirut. 95,000 displaced. 700,000 affected. PM Salam declared Hezbollah military activity 'illegal.'

name: Haifa — Hezbollah Strikes
headline: Hezbollah strikes Haifa port
detail: Hezbollah enters war, targeting Haifa port and northern Israel.

name: Maroun al-Ras — Ground Attack
headline: Hezbollah attacks Maroun al-Ras
detail: Ground attacks on Israeli border positions.

name: Kfar Kila — Hezbollah Attack
headline: Hezbollah ground attack at Kfar Kila
detail: Hezbollah ground operations at Lebanese-Israeli border.

name: Golan Heights — Strikes
headline: Hezbollah targets Golan Heights
detail: Rocket attacks on Golan Heights positions.

name: Tel Aviv — Under Attack
headline: Tel Aviv targeted; Bauhaus buildings damaged
detail: Iranian missiles target Tel Aviv. UNESCO Bauhaus heritage damaged. 12 dead, 11 missing, 777 hospitalized in Israel total.

name: Ben Gurion Airport — Missile Threat
headline: Ben Gurion Airport under missile threat
detail: Intelligence gap: confirmed hits uncertain. Airport operations disrupted.

name: Baghdad Airport — Missiles
headline: Baghdad Airport area hit by missiles
detail: Iraqi capital airport area struck. 13 dead total in Iraq. PM: won't allow territory used as platform.

name: Irbid — Jordan Shoots Down Drones
headline: Jordan actively shooting down Iranian drones
detail: Jordan becomes defensive belligerent, intercepting Iranian drones over Irbid.

name: Riyadh — US Embassy Struck
headline: US Embassy Riyadh struck by drones
detail: Drone attack on US diplomatic compound in Saudi capital.

name: Jeddah — Kuwait Airways Reroute
headline: Jeddah becomes alternative hub
detail: Kuwait Airways rerouted via Jeddah. Saudi airspace partially open.

name: Jask — Naval Operations
headline: Jask naval base area — operations
detail: IRGC Navy forward base at Jask targeted in anti-naval campaign.

name: Kharg Island — Oil Terminal
headline: Kharg Island oil export terminal targeted
detail: Iran's primary oil export facility. Handles ~90% of crude exports. Status unclear.

name: Secret Nuclear Facility Destroyed
headline: Undisclosed nuclear facility destroyed
detail: Previously unknown facility destroyed. Location approximate. IAEA assessing.

name: Khamenei Underground Bunker Destroyed
headline: B-2 bunker-busters destroy Khamenei bunker
detail: B-2 Spirit bombers deploy penetrator bombs on deep underground facility. Khamenei bunker destroyed. Officials killed unconfirmed.

name: USS Gerald R. Ford — Red Sea
headline: USS Gerald R. Ford enters Red Sea via Suez
detail: Carrier strike group repositions to Red Sea. Red Sea 'effectively closed' to Israeli/US shipping by Houthis.

name: Austin TX — Shooting
headline: Austin TX shooting — 3 dead
detail: Domestic incident. FBI investigating suspect Diagne. DHS shutdown Week 3+, CISA ~1/3 staffed.

name: Oman — Sultan Silent
headline: Oman maintains silence; Larijani back-channel
detail: Sultan of Oman still silent. Oman used as diplomatic back-channel. Larijani back-channel via Oman reported.

name: Kurdish Region — 5,000-6,000 Fighters
headline: Kurdish forces confirm US/Israel coordination
detail: 5,000-6,000 fighters on Iraqi border. Israel in talks ~1 year. Ground operation 'very likely within a week.' CIA active.

name: UNIFIL — Macron Condemns Attack
headline: Macron condemns 'unacceptable' UNIFIL attack
detail: UN peacekeeping force in Lebanon attacked. Shooter unidentified.
